input.tenant_message: Ceiling caved in after a year of telling our landlord that the ceiling has been sagging. We reported this multiple times and nothing was done until the ceiling actually collapsed.

ai_output.recommended_action: Emergency structural assessment required. Ceiling has collapsed — area must be cordoned off immediately. Dispatch structural engineer to evaluate remaining ceiling integrity and identify cause (water damage, load-bearing failure, deterioration). Tenant may need temporary relocation. Document prior complaints as evidence of landlord negligence. Report to building department.

source.post_title: Ceiling caved in after a year of telling our landlord that the ceiling has been sagging
